category_sources: Official GitHub README describes datrie as an implementation of a double-array structure for representing trie.
source_facts.description says it is a Double-Array Trie Library.
display_name_sources: Official repository path and README use libdatrie/datrie.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found and describes the library and data structure.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/tlwg/libdatrie; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes trie search and the double-array implementation.
source_facts.description identifies a double-array trie library and source_facts.executables lists trietool.
